# All Types of Flowers in the World

> A complete list of all types of flowers in the world with names, origins, colors and families.

This site contains a comprehensive index of 1,712 flowering plant species from around the world. Each species page includes common name, scientific name, botanical family, geographic origin, color variants, growing information, cultural significance, fun facts, and 5 detailed FAQs.

## Coverage

- Total species: 1,712
- Data includes: common name, scientific name, family, origin, color, description, growing tips, cultural significance, FAQs
- Format: Listicle format with metadata

## Usage

This data is freely available for educational and research purposes.

## Contact

For data corrections or additions, refer to the domain contact information.
